_meta.keyKnowledge: We experiment with visual language, methods, media and materials to generate and develop design ideas and refine our visual communication designs.

_source.w: We experiment with visual language, methods, media and materials to generate and develop design ideas and refine our visual communication designs.
y: Purposeful experimentation is the engine of design innovation and personal creative development.
Developing a broad range of technical skills gives us maximum creative flexibility.
Pushing the boundaries of our capabilities leads to more original and effective design solutions.
eg: We experiment with emerging technologies and techniques for visual communication.
We develop advanced skills in digital design tools and traditional rendering techniques.
We push creative boundaries by exploring unconventional approaches to design problems.
We use experimentation to develop our personal design style and approach.
We document our experiments and analyse how they inform our design development.
We take creative risks in our experimentation while maintaining design principles.
